title: validate_stmt skips i+2 unconditionally on :comparator
description: :comparator followed by a non-Str form (e.g., :comparator :regex "Subject" "[invalid") causes i += 2 to execute unconditionally in validate_stmt, skipping the Tag("regex") form without setting has_regex_tag. Result: an invalid regex pattern in the key position passes compile-time validation and silently returns false at eval time. Fix: move i += 2 inside the if-let block (matching the correct pattern in extract_comparator in evaluator.rs).
